data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for offline capability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the offline capability (sign now, sync later) feature, which is explicitly stated as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or functionality of this offline capability. The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of offline capability (sign now, sync later) functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for offline capability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the offline capability requirement.
